name: Anti-Static Bag
description: The ESD (Electrostatic Discharge) Shield. In theory, this crinkly silver pouch is a sacred barrier designed to protect some expensive PCB from a stray spark. In reality, it’s currently a temporary home for a handful of 'mystery screws' that didn't fit back into the chassis. Finding it is a Medium challenge—it’s reflective enough to catch the light but flat enough to hide under a single sheet of notebook paper.
